hero.subtitle: Real automations. Sellable products. Zero manual work.

services.s1desc: Autonomous agents active 24/7 managing clients, bookings and sales without human intervention.
services.s2desc: Complete workflows from first contact to invoice. Zero manual clicks, zero human errors.
services.s3desc: Your client writes or calls — your AI responds in perfect English, 24 hours a day.
services.s4desc: Digital products built for gaming ADM, hospitality and SMEs. Ready to deploy, scalable.
services.s5desc: Websites and apps that convert. Not static showcases — client acquisition machines.
services.s6desc: Visual identity that positions your brand as a leader in its market.

products.p1desc: Responds to clients on WhatsApp and voice 24/7, manages appointments, qualifies leads and sends automatic reminders. For hairdressers, medical practices, local businesses.
products.p2desc: Complete voice + WhatsApp AI system for gaming and betting. Reactivates dormant clients, manages promotions and monitors KPIs in real time.

why.label: Why us
why.desc: We don't sell consulting. We build systems that work while you sleep.
why.item1: Active systems 24/7, including nights and weekends
why.item3: Measurable ROI within the first 30 days
why.item4: No technical skills required from your team

contactSection.label: Start now
contactSection.desc: We analyze your business for free and tell you what we can automate within 72 hours.

serviziPage.label: Our services
serviziPage.desc: Every service is designed for a measurable result. No theory, no empty consulting.
serviziPage.ctaDesc: We analyze your business for free and tell you exactly what to automate first.
serviziPage.s1tagline: Your business responds, sells and manages clients 24/7
serviziPage.s1benefit: Without hiring extra staff. Without overtime. Without errors.
serviziPage.s1d2: Objection handling and FAQs without human intervention
serviziPage.s1d3: Intelligent escalation to your operators when needed
serviziPage.s1result: Our clients reduce unmanaged requests by 70% on average.
serviziPage.s2tagline: From first contact to invoice, fully automatic
serviziPage.s2benefit: Every repetitive process in your company can be automated.
serviziPage.s2d2: CRM, email, WhatsApp synchronization in one system
serviziPage.s2d3: Intelligent notifications and alerts for your team
serviziPage.s2d4: Reports and dashboards updated in real time
serviziPage.s2result: Average 15 hours of manual work saved per week per client.
serviziPage.s3tagline: Your client writes or calls — your AI responds
serviziPage.s3benefit: In perfect English, 24 hours a day, even on weekends.
serviziPage.s3d4: Automatic reminders and follow-ups to clients
serviziPage.s3result: Zero clients lost due to missed responses. Ever.
serviziPage.s4tagline: Digital products built for your specific sector
serviziPage.s4benefit: Not generic solutions — systems designed for your market.
serviziPage.s4d1: AyroDesk24 for Italian SMEs and professionals
serviziPage.s4d2: AyroHub for gaming and ADM dealers
serviziPage.s4result: Products usable from day one, no technical training needed.
serviziPage.s5benefit: Not showcase sites — client acquisition machines.
serviziPage.s5d2: Integration with AI systems and automations
serviziPage.s5result: Sites that bring inquiries, not just visits.
serviziPage.s6benefit: Design that communicates authority before the client reads a single word.
serviziPage.s6result: Brands that are remembered and chosen.

footer.description: AI Automation Agency. We build automated systems for SMEs, hospitality and gaming.
